steps.title: Set up
steps.content: A day has 1,440 total minutes. Let $y$ = non-daylight minutes. With 840 daylight minutes: $$840 + y = 1440$$

steps.title: Answer
steps.content: Since $840+600=1440$, the daylight and non-daylight minutes add to one full day. The non-daylight value is $600$ minutes, so A is correct.
